# Preface {.unnumbered}

This book is a collection of lecture notes and resources for ECN201 Econometrics at the School of Economics and Business at the Norwegian University of Life Sciences.

The class assumes that you are familiar with R.

The book follows closely @wooldridge2019 and (re-)uses many of the examples from that book. Hands-On Econometrics with R is a teaching compendium and a free supplement to @wooldridge2019.



# References {.unnumbered}
